prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic 3D miniature diorama of [LANDMARK OR LOCATION] rising magically from an open sketchbook placed on a detailed wooden desk. Tilted 45-degree isometric aerial view captured with professional tilt-shift macro photography, emphasizing the appearance of a handcrafted physical scale model.

The scene accurately recreates [PRIMARY LANDMARK FEATURES], surrounded by [SURROUNDING ENVIRONMENT]. Include tiny miniature people engaged in [HUMAN ACTIVITIES], miniature vehicles moving through [TRANSPORT ELEMENTS], and detailed urban or natural infrastructure reflecting the character of the location.

Lighting is [LIGHTING CONDITION], featuring [LIGHTING DETAILS] that create cinematic depth, realistic shadows, glowing highlights, and strong visual contrast. The environment seamlessly transitions from the fully detailed miniature world into the clean white sketchbook paper, creating a magical emergence effect.

Materials should appear physically constructed with realistic textures, micro-details, architectural accuracy, scale-model craftsmanship, and premium visual fidelity. Highly detailed vegetation, roads, water features, signage, and environmental elements should reinforce realism.

Ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic physical model appearance, depth-rich composition, realistic atmospheric perspective, professional architectural visualization, 8K resolution, masterpiece quality, intricate miniature craftsmanship, sharp focus on landmark details, aspect ratio 4:5.
